title: Functional Models, Values, and Observable Effects · Effects Clinic: Expression Reasoning
summary: Refactor a mutable billing script whose hidden state makes reruns disagree. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp expression reasoning increment in an effect map and behavior-preserving functional baseline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace expression evaluation without relying on hidden statement order.
Test whether an expression can be replaced by its value without changing program behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
